name: Gildo Mahones
abstract: Hermenengildo "Gildo" Mahones (June 2, 1929, New York City – April 27, 2018) was an American jazz pianist.

concerts.label: Bel Canto Foundation Jazz Concert to Benefit Musicians
Benefit Concert for the Student Non-Violent Coordinating Committee

about_quotes.speaker: Annie Ross
about_quotes.evidence: Whose trio backed up Lambert, Hendricks, and Ross on many – or some recordings. ... Yes. Gildo – and who was on drums?
about_quotes.doc_title: Annie Ross — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Frank Foster
about_quotes.evidence: I met people like Percy Heath and Gildo Mahones and people like that.
about_quotes.doc_title: Frank Foster — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
